changelog: 📋 Plan inline strip: clicking a preset number (5, 10, 12, 15, 30) now immediately appends `Plan ${N}` to the chat box — no separate Plan button.
Added a `More ▴` drop-up panel that opens a 6-column grid with every plan size (5–200); clicking a number appends the plan and auto-closes. Click outside to dismiss.
Removed the redundant Plan steps input — preset buttons are the only entry point now.
